label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So there are these dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them has a partner at the start of the song. The partners are: - Alice with Lola - Bob with Izzi - Claire with Sam - Dave with Patrick - Eve with Karl Then there are a series of partner switches. The question is asking who Claire is dancing with at the end after all these
